closure_source: Canonical verifier rerun with UTF-8 console encoding + Paper 09 rework CAM/GLM record
notes: The original receipt had no status due to Windows console encoding failure.
Reworked Paper 09 records the result as GLM-F1-SM01.
boundary: Finite Cayley-Dickson alpha construction closed; unbounded McKay arithmetic remains an open seam routed to NP-01.
